commit.subject: LU-6949 osd: run with no full server stack
commit.message:
LU-6949 osd: run with no full server stack

for the purpose of benchmarking it's useful to be able
to run OSD with no full server stack. the patch makes
few trivial fixes to enable that.

Change-Id: Ib8f8d33f812a5b6102452cbc184be54bf4022ac5
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
